NAME: TwinsUK
DESCRIPTION: UK adult twin registry with deep multi-omics and phenotyping; genotype and sequence data widely used in GWAS, heritability, and multi-trait genetic analyses.
MANUAL_CITATION: Moayyeri, A., Hammond, C. J., Hart, D. J., Spector, T. D., & Oellinger, W. (2013). Cohort Profile: TwinsUK and healthy ageing twin study. International Journal of Epidemiology, 42(1), 76-85.
